bv_initiate_worker_timer(){setTimeout(function(){workerFinished||(bvDebugLog("WORKER_TIMEDOUT"),workerFinished=!0,bvWorker.terminate()),bvEventHandler(),startAutoInjectTimer()},BV_WORKER_TIMEOUT_DURATION)}__name(bv_initiate_worker_timer,"bv_initiate_worker_timer");
</script>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a1719b6 elementor-widget elementor-widget-html" data-id="a1719b6" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="html.default">
					<style>
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;
}

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

					<style>
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;
}

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a1719b6 elementor-widget elementor-widget-html" data-id="a1719b6" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="html.default">
					<style>
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;
}

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

					<style>
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;
}

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0728df0 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="0728df0" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Shopify <span style="color: #b18945">UI UX Design</span> That Turns Visitors Into Loyal Customers</h2>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b6be88d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="b6be88d" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									Your store gets one chance to make a first impression. If the layout confuses people, if the navigation feels clunky, if the checkout creates even a second of hesitation, they leave. Ecomm Wizards builds Shopify UI UX design systems that remove every point of friction between your customer and the buy button. No templates. No guesswork. Just data backed design that looks premium and converts like it should.								</div>

									Most Shopify homepages try to show everything at once and end up communicating nothing. We take a completely different approach to Shopify UI UX design for your homepage. 					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Stop Losing Buyers Between the Homepage and the Product Page</h2>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a95c533 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="a95c533" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									Collection pages are where most stores silently bleed revenue. Customers land here ready to browse, and they get hit with a wall of products with no visual hierarchy, no filters that actually work, and no reason to keep scrolling. Our Shopify UI UX design for collection pages fixes all of that. Smart filtering, grid layouts that highlight bestsellers and new arrivals, quick view options, and visual cues that guide shoppers toward the products they are most likely to buy.								</div>

        <div class="carousel-nav" id="carouselNav">
            <span class="nav-dot active" onclick="goToSlide(0)"></span>
            <span class="nav-dot" onclick="goToSlide(1)"></span>
            <span class="nav-dot" onclick="goToSlide(2)"></span>
            <span class="nav-dot" onclick="goToSlide(3)"></span>
            <span class="nav-dot" onclick="goToSlide(4)"></span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script type="bv_inline_delayed_js" bv_unique_id="E0pis9SqDS7jI6DJBB81" defer="1" data-cfasync="" async="">(function() {
            // Wrap everything in IIFE to avoid conflicts
            let videoReviewCurrentSlide = 0;
            const videoReviewTotalSlides = 5;
            const videoReviewTrack = document.getElementById('carouselTrack');
            const videoReviewDots = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot');
            let videoReviewAutoScrollInterval;

            function videoReviewUpdateCarousel() {
                videoReviewTrack.style.transform = `translateX(-${videoReviewCurrentSlide * 100}%)`;
                videoReviewDots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.classList.toggle('active', index === videoReviewCurrentSlide);
                });
                
                // Pause all videos except current slide
                for (let i = 1; i <= videoReviewTotalSlides; i++) {
                    const video = document.getElementById(`video${i}`);
                    const playBtn = document.getElementById(`playBtn${i}`);
                    if (video && !video.paused && i !== videoReviewCurrentSlide + 1) {
                        video.pause();
                        playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                    }
                }
            }

            function videoReviewNextSlide() {
                videoReviewCurrentSlide = (videoReviewCurrentSlide + 1) % videoReviewTotalSlides;
                videoReviewUpdateCarousel();
            }

            function videoReviewStartAutoScroll() {
                videoReviewStopAutoScroll();
                videoReviewAutoScrollInterval = setInterval(videoReviewNextSlide, 4000);
            }

            function videoReviewStopAutoScroll() {
                if (videoReviewAutoScrollInterval) {
                    clearInterval(videoReviewAutoScrollInterval);
                }
            }

            window.toggleVideoReview = function(videoNum) {
                const video = document.getElementById(`video${videoNum}`);
                const playBtn = document.getElementById(`playBtn${videoNum}`);
                
                if (video.paused) {
                    video.play();
                    playBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                    // Stop auto-scroll when video plays
                    videoReviewStopAutoScroll();
                } else {
                    video.pause();
                    playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                    // Resume auto-scroll when video pauses
                    videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                }
            };

            // Video ended and pause event listeners
            for (let i = 1; i <= videoReviewTotalSlides; i++) {
                const video = document.getElementById(`video${i}`);
                const playBtn = document.getElementById(`playBtn${i}`);
                if (video && playBtn) {
                    video.addEventListener('ended', () => {
                        playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                        // Resume auto-scroll when video ends
                        videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                    });

                    video.addEventListener('pause', () => {
                        playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                        // Resume auto-scroll when video is paused
                        videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                    });

                    video.addEventListener('play', () => {
                        playBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                        // Stop auto-scroll when video plays
                        videoReviewStopAutoScroll();
                    });
                }
            }

            // Dot click events
            videoReviewDots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    videoReviewCurrentSlide = index;
                    videoReviewUpdateCarousel();
                    // Restart auto-scroll after manual navigation
                    videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                });
            });

            // Start auto-scroll initially
            videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
        })();</script>
</body>
</html>				</div>

<script id="bv-lazyload-video" data-cfasync="false" bv-exclude="true">var bv_load_video_on_user_action = true

var bv_video_lazyload_events = ["mousemove", "click", "keydown", "wheel", "touchmove", "touchend"]

var bv_video_load_event_executed = false
var bv_video_user_action_performed = false


window.addEventListener('load', () => {
  bv_video_load_event_executed = true;
  handle_lazyload_videos();
})

for (const event of bv_video_lazyload_events) {
  window.addEventListener(event, handle_video_lazyload_events, { once: true });
}

function handle_video_lazyload_events() {
  for (const event of bv_video_lazyload_events) {
    window.removeEventListener(event, handle_video_lazyload_events);
  }

  bv_video_user_action_performed = true
  handle_lazyload_videos();
}


document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
	handle_lazyload_videos()
})

function bv_set_video_element_src(element) {
	let _src = element.getAttribute('bv-data-src')
	if (_src) {
		element.setAttribute('src', _src)
	}
}

function handle_lazyload_videos() {
	if ( (!bv_load_video_on_user_action && bv_video_load_event_executed) || (bv_load_video_on_user_action && bv_video_user_action_performed && bv_video_load_event_executed) ) {

		if('IntersectionObserver' in window) {	
			function handleVideoTags(entries) {
				entries.map((entry) => {
					if (entry.isIntersecting) {
						bv_set_video_element_src(entry.target)
						video_lazy_observer.unobserve(entry.target)
					}
				})
			}

			const video_lazy_observer = new IntersectionObserver(handleVideoTags)
			let video_elements = document.querySelectorAll('.bv-lazyload-video')
			video_elements.forEach((video_element) => {
				video_lazy_observer.observe(video_element)
			})

		} else {
			let video_elements = document.querySelectorAll('.bv-lazyload-video')
			video_elements.forEach((video_element) => {
				bv_set_video_element_src(video_element)
			})
		}
	}
}
</script>
